name: Lucius “The Blind”

sheet.name: Lucius “The Blind”
sheet.background_story:
Born in the castle of King Arthur many say is the unrecognized son of Dorian “The Wise” Kings Arthur hand. 

He’s a survivor of the battle between Agora and The Serpent 

After the battle in the church Lucius was possessed by an entity that called himself “Dark Lucius”  that entity vanish after Lucius was attacked and almost killed in the Burrow.
